decision: Add a top-level 'Containers' nav group (subFeatures running/devcontainers/testcontainers) and remove devcontainers + testcontainers as top-level plugins; their routes/pages are unchanged and reparented under the Containers submenu.
rationale: Operator-approved IA: one Containers group with a read-only host 'Running' view plus the existing devcontainers/testcontainers reachable as submenu choices.
alternatives: Keep devcontainers/testcontainers top-level and add Running last (rejected by operator); nested two-level submenu (unnecessary — testcontainers has its own layout sidebar).

decision: New GET /api/containers does an unfiltered host `docker ps` (read-only, no auth like other GET listings), reusing the dockerode socket detection; pings the daemon first to return 503 with a clear message when Docker is unavailable.
rationale: The Running view needs ALL host containers, unlike /api/testcontainers which filters by the testcontainers label.
alternatives: Extend the testcontainers docker-client (rejected: it is label-scoped and plugin-coupled).

decision: Strip Docker labels from the GET /api/containers response (do not return them at all).
rationale: Codex validation flagged that labels frequently carry secrets (registry creds, CI tokens, Tailscale auth keys) and this is an unauthenticated read-only endpoint; the Running view does not display labels. Also removed stale [subfeatures.*.devcontainers] config sections.
alternatives: Whitelist non-sensitive label keys (rejected: simpler and safer to omit entirely since the UI does not use them).
